revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->

[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EFloras here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EFloras for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = George <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina <!-- Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union -->
  | 11 = Yatskievych <!-- Flora of Missouri -->
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}<!--
-->{{template other
    |
    <!-- Categorize if |first= and |first1= are missing,
        unless the flora is Flora of Missouri,
        Ornamental Plants from Russia and Adjacent States of the Former Soviet Union,
        or Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador. -->
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |      }}<!--
   -->{{#switch:{{{1|}}}<!-- If Flora of North America, Flora of China, Flora of Chile -->
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}<!-- Check for parameters that are used to add the volume number. -->
         |
         |         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!--
  PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS
-->

[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EFloras for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation 
| _alias-map = first1:first,last1:last
| _exclude = family, tribe
| mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
| contribution = {{#invoke:eFloras|name|1={{{3|{{#if:{{#property:P225}}|{{#property:P225}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|}}}|nv| '''Synonym'''}}
| contribution-url = {{eFloras/url|flora_id={{{1|}}}|taxon_id={{{2|}}}}}
| volume = {{#invoke:eFloras|volume|{{{1|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}
| date = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 1 | {{#invoke:eFloras|volumeDate|{{{1|}}}|{{{volume|}}}|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}} }}
| first = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Tatyana 
  | 11 = George 
  | 201 = Carmen
  }}
| last = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 120 = Shulkina 
  | 11 = Yatskievych 
  | 201 = Ulloa Ulloa
  }}
| first2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Peter Møller
  }}
| last2 = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 201 = Jørgensen
  }}
| title = {{#invoke:eFloras|resource|{{{1|}}}}}
| trans-title = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Trees and shrubs of the Andes of Ecuador }}
| language = {{#ifeq: {{{1|}}} | 201 | Spanish }}
| url = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = http://www.efloras.org/flora_page.aspx?flora_id=1
  }}
| location = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = New York and Oxford
  }}
| publisher = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = Oxford University Press
  }}
| editor = {{#switch: {{{1|}}}
  | 1 = ((Flora of North America Editorial Committee))
  }}
| via = eFloras.org, [[Missouri Botanical Garden]], St. Louis, MO & [[Harvard University Herbaria]], Cambridge, MA
}}{{template other
    |
    
    |{{#if:{{{first|{{{first1|}}}}}}{{#switch:{{{1|}}} | 11 | 120 | 201 = 1}}
      |
      |      }}{{#switch:{{{1|}}}
       | 1 | 2 | 60 =
       {{#if:{{{volume|{{{family|{{{tribe|}}}}}}}}}
         |
         |         }}
       }}
  }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without author names]]
[[Category:Pages using eFloras template without volume]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
